title: ISOLATION OF CURCUMIN EXTRACT FROM CURCUMA LONGA
author: Rakhimova, M.SH.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Curcumin, a polyphenol of yellow crystals with that gives turmeric its yellow color, it is extracted from the rhizome of turmeric. It belongs to the perennial herb named Curcuma longa L.
steps_raw: Curcumin, a polyphenol of yellow crystals with that gives turmeric its yellow color, it is extracted from the rhizome of turmeric. It belongs to the perennial herb named Curcuma longa L.
